name: STLLR Gold Inc.
description: STLLR Gold Inc. is a leading Canadian gold development company focused on advancing its high-potential assets, including the Tower Gold Project in Timmins, Ontario, and the Colomac Gold Project in the Northwest Territories. Additionally, the company is developing the Hollinger Tailings Project, which offers near-term cash flow potential. With a significant mineral resource inventory and an experienced leadership team, STLLR Gold is committed to strategic growth and operational excellence within Canada’s mining-friendly jurisdiction, aiming to deliver substantial value to its investors through large-scale, open-pit, and underground mining projects.
